I am seeking an illustrator for a picture-and-verse philosophy book for families. The book humorously explores ethical and social issues surrounding the idea of bringing back extinct species. The manuscript has been accepted for publication, and I need a consistent set of illustrations to accompany it.

I am also adding two completely new pages. I will provide the text and images; your job is to build the pages so the content looks sharp on every screen size, loads quickly, and matches the overall style of the rest of the site.

jobs.description:
My site is ready for visitors, but its pages still hover below the first results on Google. I want a focused, on-page SEO revamp that will push those rankings higher and keep them there.

I’m ready to bring someone into my life and work who can become the “Donna-from-Suits” I lean on every day. Your primary contribution will be providing emotional and professional support, helping me stay centred, focused, and effective no matter how crowded the calendar gets.

jobs.title: General Virtual Assistant Support
jobs.description:
I need a reliable, tech-savvy virtual assistant who can step in and take everyday pressure off my shoulders. The mix of work will vary week to week—sometimes it will be straightforward inbox triage and calendar scheduling, other times light customer support, data entry, or quick online research. I will brief you on priorities each morning (my local time is UTC-4), then leave you to organise, execute, and circle back with concise status updates.
